 真的非常符合我的口味啊好久没读到这么符合我口味的了读起来很爽 没有一点窝囊的剧情 女主的性格冷艳高贵就喜欢这种掌握全局的感受  期待后面[雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765128833,"group_id":"7566490059076029464","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3932326642332228"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7566490059076029464","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"110"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16163,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7581112295869268798","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看 读书厌倦期都给我治好了  女主真的很符合我的口味 一点都不鳖窝囊气 读起来太爽了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765117629,"group_id":"7566490059076029464","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"冬天，这个银装素裹的季节","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxavD1YU+s9GRdQ1r84XhaCu+kyW35wir9ar2Bi1VUEY","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/de8f26f9e7b24931a4d41d4337c15801~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707626&x-signature=P8e6E6N5kTS7OSAO59bQW%2FFU2T0%3D","user_id":"3932326642332228","user_name":"朙悲"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3932326642332228","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7566490059076029464","book_info":{"abstract":"（开分啦，新书开分所以不高，会涨的会涨的！喜欢这个题材的大宝们不要错过噢~）
【穿书短命女配大小姐+白莲花的F4+古早玛丽苏+权谋+祖传式狗血味+恶女觉醒+贵族学院+继承者游戏+疯子修罗场】
（多男主，目前单箭头，男全洁！洁！）
书中原女主皖染，善良清纯小白花，财阀许家流浪在外的小姐。
跟随许父的老白月光，也就是自己的母亲回到许家，一来就让恶毒女配大小姐许肆嫉妒成恨死于一场意外。
而后在埃顿斯贵族学院结识了四位世家财阀贵公子。
被她从家族的生死厮杀中救赎的阳光善良奶狗，
一步步爬升到制高点的阴蛰舔狗，
为了女主甘愿低下高贵的头颅的黑道继承人，
站在顶峰的世家少主，给了女主至高无上的荣耀……
蓝星而来的许肆：重开一局，我谋划十八年，我就看你有没有本事来抢我的东西？
皖染：我皖染也不是软柿子。
许肆：我的世界，我才是王。
继承游戏，由我书写。
————
阅读指南：
女主很善良（对人）
有逻辑（不多）
爽文（绝对）
有三观（三观跟着五观走）
避雷：绝对爽文！但喜欢掀桌子掀板凳那种爽的右键离开…本文主要爽点在于计谋攻伐并非动手，当然，该动手也没有手软，接受的大宝们欢迎开启一段美好的旅程～","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6a0a848ebb236ec43824a987e84c80eb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"麦杉","author_id":"","book_id":"7566490059076029464","book_name":"烬色继承","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4115人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":748,"name":"豪门总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=748&name=豪门总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":519,"name":"大小姐","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=519&name=大小姐&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7566490296653988376","read_count":"4115","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"647611"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"307","tags":"豪门总裁,现代言情,校园,穿书,大小姐,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/bbafed75222784267e9d7cdfe72d4579~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304005&x-signature=44DkWeSrPejrK32hUZf1nhaRGZQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2955078956488344","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"40"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322030645DCA77D63A1566B7C6965"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5728,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1794},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1765118371,"author_reply_time":1765150507,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7581175201159725849","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者怎么这么会写的，我很喜欢万人迷，但之前看的万人迷文总是单一攻略各种男主，剧情雷同，总是差不多情节的攻略，没有其他线，让人没有看下去的欲望，这个简直了，女主是我想要的霸气飒爽但有血有肉且这么多优秀的人喜欢的女主。女主太优秀了吧，智商超高，剧情怎么这么好的啊，太爽了，我就是要这种感情与事业线都有的文。太爽了，评分指的9.6及以上，目前在我心里是满分的，🍅我看过最好看的一篇"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765139566,"group_id":"7566490059076029464","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"941637690210680"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7566490059076029464","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"114"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11154,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7581168456094548761","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"满分满分！！！！！！！女主有野心，每个人都很聪明，反转再反转，情节跌宕起伏我太喜欢了，情情爱爱不多，很带感！每个人都好有魅力啊！作者写的真好，女主太飒了🥰，就是为什么没完结！！我目前挺喜欢颜烬颜约和商臣渊的，结局我希望不要和任何一个在一起，在一起的话那就颜烬吧，他特别爱女主，目前来看最爱女主的，并且还是早就爱上的那种。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765139180,"group_id":"7566490059076029464","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"博览群书，对文笔要求高，对剧情要求高","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4UbgE80oP5XYGc82hDUfFs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/400599f9ca0242619aa8df4b6e5d2265~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707488&x-signature=Absfk86yTxN7bh1Efepi6KGVOvs%3D","user_id":"941637690210680","user_name":"哈巴的冥泉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"941637690210680","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7566490059076029464","book_info":{"abstract":"（开分啦，新书开分所以不高，会涨的会涨的！喜欢这个题材的大宝们不要错过噢~）
